title: Development Engineer (m/f/d) Embedded Software
description:
International, innovative, pioneering: We at BRP-Rotax are part of the global company BRP and we are passionate about moving the world's most exciting powersports vehicles. Technological progress and sustainable mobility are our drive. Are you ready to shape the future with us?

At BRP-Rotax, you can expect an engaging and dynamic environment where you can help to develop industry-leading drive technologies. We invest in our employees, providing them with the support and resources they need to succeed. As a member of our global team, you can expect exciting, varied responsibilities as well as a wide range of development perspectives. Because we believe that your career path should be as unique as you are.

Your new adventure

- Responsibility for the development of embedded software for controlling Rotax powertrains.
- Development of highly integrated tools for automatic software generation.
- Contributing to the design of a multi-domain software architecture for the next generation of electronic control units (ECUs).
- Contributing to software development processes with regard to ASPICE, ISO 26262, and cybersecurity.
- Managing software projects.
- Contributing to the development and implementation of AI applications.

Your Skills And Experiences

- Successfully completed technical degree (University of Applied Sciences or University) in Computer Science, Telematics, Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, Automotive Engineering, or a related field.
- Expertise in embedded software development, including the design and implementation of associated development processes.
- Knowledge of software development standards such as ASPICE, ISO 26262, and AUTOSAR is an advantage.
- Knowledge of multi-domain electronic control units (ECUs) is an advantage.
- Programming skills in C, C#, and Python.
- Understanding of electrical and/or internal combustion engine powertrain technology is an advantage.
- Very good English and good German language skills.
- A proactive personality with enthusiasm for the powersports industry.

We offer

You will be offered an exciting position in an international company with many interesting benefits and diverse development opportunities. The minimum salary for this position is EUR 60,962.32 € gross/year in accordance with the collective agreement for the metal industry. Depending on your qualifications and professional experience, we offer an attractive and performance-related salary with corresponding overpayment. We will be happy to discuss the details personally as part of our application process.

Transforming mobility. Creating powertrain technology that is smarter, cleaner, safer and lighter. That’s what we’re passionate about at BRP-Rotax, and we do it by creating world-class powertrain systems. We are a premier OEM in the global recreational and powersports industry with full capabilities in design, development, testing and manufacturing of complex powertrain systems. Our name stands for quality, environmental consciousness, and safety. Innovation is what drives us and we drive innovation. Dream big and create the future of mobility at BRP-Rotax.
